name: Multiplexer
shortDescription: A multiplexer (MUX) selects one of many inputs and routes it to a single output based on a select code.
whatIsIt: A multiplexer (MUX) selects one of many inputs and routes it to a single output based on a select code.
whyExists: MUXes save pins and wires by sharing one line among many signals.
whereUsed: Used in data selection, Analog-to-Digital Converter (ADC) input switching, and buses.
